SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST GEORGE M RUSH, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-09-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-24-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PLAINTIFF ANDREA TOSI'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDARATION OF SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 4/10/2012 TO GEORGE M. RUSH, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (610)

Notice Of Motion Andm Motion For Reconsideration Of Sanctions
Off Calendar May-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Andrea Tosi's Motion for Reconsidaration of Sanctions issued on 4/10/2012 to George M. Rush, Esq., in the amount of $350.00 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings not reported. (610)
